base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_eagle_fly — a character from 1986 castlevania. Eagle — 2-frame soaring wings. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Eagle — 2-frame soaring wings; carries Fleaman which drops on approach. Level 3 Tower
